manifest.title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence Lab v29
manifest.tagline: No proof package, no serious trust. No validation, no settlement. No receipt, no credibility.

boundary.claimBoundary: Public-safe synthetic demonstration of a proof requirement and due-diligence standard. It is not financial advice, legal advice, investment advice, production certification, an audit, a wallet, escrow, exchange, broker, custodian, or live settlement system.
notClaimed: legal, financial, tax, or investment advice

proofRequestCard.oneLiner: Blockchain projects should not just ask for trust. They should pass proof-based due diligence.
proofRequestCard.copyPasteAsk: Before we trust, fund, list, vote, approve, settle, or promote this blockchain claim: where is the proof package?

requiredPackage.label: Public proof package URL
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: A single public place to inspect the claim and its evidence.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: The claim remains marketing, not diligence-ready.

requiredPackage.label: Mission contract
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: What was promised, by whom, under what acceptance criteria.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: No one can tell whether the work was actually complete.

requiredPackage.label: Evidence docket
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: Artifacts, commits, reports, hashes, provenance, and boundaries.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: The project has claims, but no structured proof.

requiredPackage.label: Replay path
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: How another reviewer can check the result again.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: The work cannot graduate from assertion to reviewable evidence.

requiredPackage.label: Validator review
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: What independent or role-specific review passed, failed, or challenged.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: The claim should not become mature or settlement-ready.

requiredPackage.label: Risk ledger
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: Known limitations, unresolved risks, rollback path, and challenge window.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: Stakeholders cannot price or govern the remaining risk.

requiredPackage.label: Human authority
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: Who accepted, rejected, or held the claim.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: No release, payout, upgrade, or public reliance should occur.

requiredPackage.label: Signed receipt
requiredPackage.plainEnglish: A durable decision record with hash commitments and boundary language.
requiredPackage.blockIfMissing: No serious credibility or settlement readiness.

proofRequestCard.publicSafeUse: Copy this into DAO proposals, grant reviews, partner diligence, audit closeout, treasury approvals, and community questions.

stakeholderRequirementMap.message: Every stakeholder can ask the same simple question, then require the same proof package before trust escalates.

stakeholders.name: Community user
stakeholders.ask: Before I trust this claim, where is the proof package?
stakeholders.requires: Public proof package URL, readable summary, current decision state.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: DAO delegate
stakeholders.ask: Before I vote yes, what evidence supports the proposal?
stakeholders.requires: Mission contract, evidence docket, validation note, risk ledger, receipt boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Grant committee
stakeholders.ask: Before a payout, did the milestone pass acceptance?
stakeholders.requires: Acceptance criteria, proof mapping, reviewer signoff, payout readiness receipt.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Treasury council
stakeholders.ask: Before funds move, what proves the vendor earned them?
stakeholders.requires: Deliverable evidence, replay notes, authority decision, settlement gate.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Security reviewer
stakeholders.ask: Before closure, can the fix be independently checked?
stakeholders.requires: Finding map, patch evidence, test output, residual risk, challenge window.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Investor or partner
stakeholders.ask: Before diligence passes, what proof supports the project’s material claims?
stakeholders.requires: Claims matrix, proof status, unresolved risks, receipts, governance boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Enterprise procurement
stakeholders.ask: Before approval, does the project meet institutional evidence standards?
stakeholders.requires: RFP proof checklist, responsible owners, audit trail, redaction boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: AI-agent operator
stakeholders.ask: Before the agent is paid or reused, what ProofBundle validates the work?
stakeholders.requires: Task trace, tool scope, validator review, signed receipt, reusable capability gate.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

selectedScenario.name: DAO grant payout
selectedScenario.trustEvent: A team asks for the next grant tranche.
selectedScenario.requiredDecision: Release only after milestone evidence maps to acceptance criteria and reviewer signoff.

dueDiligenceScorecard.scoringRule: Require at least 85/100 plus human authority and receipt before settlement readiness.

candidates.name: Partial evidence project
candidates.verdict: hold pending validation, authority, and receipt

daoPolicyTemplate.title: No proof package, no payout, no upgrade, no closure, no serious trust.
policyClauses: Every material funding, upgrade, grant, audit-remediation, RWA, AI-agent, or treasury claim must link to a proof package.
A proof package must include mission contract, evidence docket, replay path, validator review, risk ledger, human authority, and signed receipt.
Announcement-only claims remain CLAIM_ONLY and cannot trigger settlement readiness.
Partial evidence may enter review but remains on hold until validation, authority, and receipt are complete.
Public dashboards may show proof status, claim maturity, challenge state, and receipt hash without exposing private or confidential data.
daoPolicyTemplate.defaultMotion: Resolved: this organization requires a GoalOS-style proof package before material trust, payout, governance approval, or settlement readiness.

rfpTemplate.title: Proof Package Requirement for Blockchain Vendors, Grantees, and Partners
rfpTemplate.instructions: Attach this requirement to grants, RFPs, milestone agreements, partner approvals, and treasury vendor scopes.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: A single public place to inspect the claim and its evidence.
requiredFields.missingResult: The claim remains marketing, not diligence-ready.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: What was promised, by whom, under what acceptance criteria.
requiredFields.missingResult: No one can tell whether the work was actually complete.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: Artifacts, commits, reports, hashes, provenance, and boundaries.
requiredFields.missingResult: The project has claims, but no structured proof.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: How another reviewer can check the result again.
requiredFields.missingResult: The work cannot graduate from assertion to reviewable evidence.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: What independent or role-specific review passed, failed, or challenged.
requiredFields.missingResult: The claim should not become mature or settlement-ready.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: Known limitations, unresolved risks, rollback path, and challenge window.
requiredFields.missingResult: Stakeholders cannot price or govern the remaining risk.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: Who accepted, rejected, or held the claim.
requiredFields.missingResult: No release, payout, upgrade, or public reliance should occur.

requiredFields.whyItMatters: A durable decision record with hash commitments and boundary language.
requiredFields.missingResult: No serious credibility or settlement readiness.

rfpTemplate.acceptanceLanguage: Payment, recognition, launch support, listing support, public endorsement, or governance readiness should not proceed until the receipt-ready proof package is complete.

steps.meaning: The project made an assertion without a full proof package.
steps.nextAction: Request missing proof and keep irreversible action paused.

steps.meaning: Stakeholders have asked for the proof package.
steps.nextAction: Request missing proof and keep irreversible action paused.

steps.meaning: Evidence exists, but replay or validation is incomplete.
steps.nextAction: Request missing proof and keep irreversible action paused.

steps.meaning: Some proof exists, but risk, challenge, or authority is unresolved.
steps.nextAction: Request missing proof and keep irreversible action paused.

steps.meaning: Mission, evidence, replay, validation, authority, and receipt are aligned.
steps.publicAnswer: The claim is credibility-ready and settlement-ready in the demo.
steps.nextAction: Consider settlement readiness under applicable governance and law.

hardStops: no replay path for high-stakes claims

dashboardSchema.purpose: A corporate-friendly public dashboard schema that lets stakeholders see proof status without exposing private data.

exampleRow.claim: A team asks for the next grant tranche.

receipt.statement: This lab demonstrates how stakeholders can require proof packages before trust, funding, governance, reputation, or settlement readiness.
